_: Canonical Daylight DC-1 facts. Every tool in the skill pack reads this file; correct it here and the whole pack recalibrates. Fields marked measured:false are educated defaults awaiting a reading from a real device — see site/calibrate.html.

gray_levels_practical.note: eyes resolve ~9-16 in ambient light; count on calibrate.html

devicePixelRatio.note: read from calibrate.html on a real DC-1

curve._: LivePaper simulation: luminance -> shadow-crushing gamma -> compressed range -> paper tint. Tuned by eye, not measured.

hk_lift.note: Helmholtz-Kohlrausch chroma-to-lightness factor used by daylight-map
